相信文字有温度，故事能下酒。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5HZ4Bx2FcaD300MHFYfy4lRu2LY1knNkpcxm4sKuIPr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bc5d2b81394848d198be0ea5ca0af6d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534661&x-signature=sKmmMHO3fs8t8pXR6YFb4gB5eVU%3D","user_id":"3901503911236429","user_name":"爱吃油煎土豆的关教授"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3901503911236429","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612673877344259097","book_info":{"abstract":"程序员苏逸穿越了。
绑定的【天命编辑器】告诉他两件事：
一、他只有30天可活。
二、他能看到所有人的好感度。
宗门大师姐路过：【好感度8】
魔道圣女堵他：【好感度28，正在撩你】
凡尘长公主指婚：【好感度57，备注：她说谎了】
捡来的小丫头睁开眼第一句话：“……爹？”
苏逸想苟着发育，低调做人。
但系统每天都在弹窗——
【叮——新目标接近，初始好感度35】
【叮——又一位，初始好感度42】
【叮——检测到六道视线锁定，这辈子跑不掉了】
后来，高岭之花为他挡剑，小魔女为他脸红，长公主站在城墙上说“我等不了他了”，连来杀他的天道化身都回头说“谢谢你让我知道什么是活着”。
苏逸看着身边六道绝色身影，沉默了。
他只想活着。
但她们想要他。
系统还在疯狂助攻。
---
数据修仙，稳健发育。
她们的心跳他都看得见。
他自己的，早就乱了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d6a45bb7be895676915e79b0d8d3bb30~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃油煎土豆的关教授","author_id":"","book_id":"7612673877344259097","book_name":"苟着发育，系统逼我开后宫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c09868","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612826984845935129","read_count":"18","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"196782"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,穿越,系统,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d6a45bb7be895676915e79b0d8d3bb30~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173106&x-signature=7Mdq3rXt2KAwkaiNdRHcccxMxe8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3901503911236429","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"0"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320144505FE3980DF54BE4353FE00"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur
